title: Forge String Unpatched - Powered Permanent String
description:
Restored use shears break tripwire resulting Powered Permanent String | 
Unfix MC-129055 in Forge / NeoForge
body:
# Unfix MC-129055
Forge/NeoForge is [fixed](https://github.com/neoforged/NeoForge/blob/1.21.1/patches/net/minecraft/world/level/block/TripWireHookBlock.java.patch) MC-129055 , Automatica String Duper is cannot build in Survival, this mod unfixed this bug to allow Automatica String Duper build.
Unfix MC-129055 in Forge / NeoForge, Auto Tripwire Duper and String replace Nether Portal bottom obsidian is request this bug
This mod is only run as Dedicated Server or Integrated Server (Singleplayer) ## With this mod ![With this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df1ab2084eff4bb92d8ad2d507a80ccebce46d62.png) ## Not with this mod ![Not with this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f33d3543bb121e470f7cd879c2f3416e306f62d2.png) ## Support Version |MC Version|NeoForge|Forge| |-|-|-| |1.21.1|Support|Not Support| |1.20.1|Support|Support| |1.19.2| |Support| |1.18.2| |Support| |1.16.5| |Not Support|
